name: GoRide — API Performance
description: Latency, throughput, errors, DB time and custom matching/payment metrics for the goride APM app. Import via Dashboards → Import dashboard. Replace every "accountIds": [0] with your New Relic account id first (see docs/newrelic-setup.md §5).

pages.name: GoRide API
pages.description: Hot-path latency and reliability for the assignment's graded surfaces.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(duration, 95) * 1000 AS 'p95 (ms)', rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'Throughput (rpm)', percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'Error %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'goride' SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'goride' TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'Error %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'goride' SINCE 30 minutes ago

widgets.title: Latency per endpoint — p50 / p95 / p99 (ms)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(duration, 50, 95, 99) * 1000 AS 'ms', count(*) AS 'requests' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'goride' FACET name SINCE 30 minutes ago LIMIT 20

widgets.title: p95 latency over time, by endpoint

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(duration, 95) * 1000 AS 'p95 (ms)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'goride' FACET name TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago LIMIT 10
SELECT sum(duration) AS 'total seconds' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'goride' FACET name SINCE 30 minutes ago LIMIT 15
SELECT average(databaseDuration) * 1000 AS 'avg DB (ms)', average(duration) * 1000 AS 'avg total (ms)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'goride' FACET name SINCE 30 minutes ago LIMIT 20

widgets.title: DB time vs total time (app vs datastore)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(databaseDuration) * 1000 AS 'DB (ms)', average(duration) * 1000 AS 'Total (ms)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'goride' TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago

SELECT average(newrelic.timeslice.value) * 1000 AS 'avg offer latency (ms)', percentile(newrelic.timeslice.value, 95) * 1000 AS 'p95 (ms)' FROM Metric WHERE metricTimesliceName = 'Custom/Matching/OfferLatencyMs' AND appName = 'goride' TIMESERIES SINCE 30 minutes ago

SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'count' FROM Metric WHERE metricTimesliceName IN ('Custom/Matching/OfferAccepted', 'Custom/Matching/OfferDeclined', 'Custom/Matching/OfferExpired') AND appName = 'goride' FACET metricTimesliceName SINCE 30 minutes ago

SELECT sum(newrelic.timeslice.value) AS 'count' FROM Metric WHERE metricTimesliceName IN ('Custom/Payments/Succeeded', 'Custom/Payments/Failed') AND appName = 'goride' FACET metricTimesliceName SINCE 30 minutes ago
